_comment: Engram enforcement config. Read by both the git hooks (hooks/git/*) and the Claude Code guard (hooks/claude/guard_git.py). Edit to fit your project. If this file is missing or broken, the hooks fall back to these same built-in defaults, so they still work out of the box.
_comment_protected_scope: 'protected-branches' (default, public-safe): only pushes targeting a protected branch require a COMPLETE QA record. 'all-pushes': ANY git push to origin requires a COMPLETE QA record.

secret_scan._comment_deny_paths: Secret FILES (not just secret values). Includes DB dumps (*.db/*.sqlite) and Obsidian vault internals (.obsidian/). Add private vault roots to vault_dirs to deny everything under them.

_comment_stop_list: Extra destructive-op matchers for the Claude Code guard (guard_git.py). All CONFIRM-level (ask the human) except deny_write_on_protected_branch, which is a hard DENY (branch-first rule).
